past elections, Asian Americans have faced series barriers exercising their right vote, including segregated "Asian" voting lines.
When news media reported election results, Asian Americans were overlooked.
response, Asian American Legal Defense Education Fund (AALDEF) conducted non-partisan survey Asian American voters document Asian American voting patterns document instances anti-Asian voter disenfranchisement.
AALDEF also monitored elections compliance with federal Voting Rights Act, which mandates bilingual ballots forbids anti-Asian voter discrimination.

Canadians have voiced significant concerns about Canada-China Investment Agreement.
clear that this foreign investment agreement different from previous ones that Conservative government signed.
There provision this agreement that allows government withhold documents from Canadian public conduct hearings behind closed doors during arbitration process.
This arbitration process could costly Canadian taxpayers, could raise serious constitutional questions.
Significantly, this agreement does guarantee increased market access investment protection Canadians China, which seems counter goal signing investment agreement first place.
Liberal Party continues call government have public hearings implications this agreement, Conservatives refuse defend their flawed agreement Canadian public.
Because Liberal motion International Trade committee Liberal International Trade Critic Wayne Easter, were able force Conservatives hold briefing agreement department officials.
However, hour briefing simply enough agreement that could remain force years.
Liberals believe transparency, public consultations, negotiating agreements benefit Canadian people.
That Joyce Murray, Liberal Critic Asia-Pacific Gateway, forward motion House Commons that would require government send treaties committee comprehensive public review debate once tabled House Commons.
want future treaties ratified without public scrutiny, like Canada-China Investment Agreement.
necessary have this committee oversight because significant concerns raised about lack real trade strategy from government.
Harper government's approach appears that "signing" trade agreements with virtually country willing, somehow translates into trade strategy.
This simply case, must ensure that international trade agreement that Canada signs will benefit Canadians.
encourage write Conservative members Parliament asking them support Liberal efforts change government ratifies treaties like Canada-China Investment Agreement ensure public consultation debate.
want make sure that Canadians like have your voices heard these important issues.
